#olHeader .ol-header__call-wrapper{
text-shadow: 
rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px 0px,  rgba(0,0,0,0.1) -2px 0px,

rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px 2px , rgba(0,0,0,0.1) -2px 2px,
rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px -2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) -2px -2px,
rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 1px 2px,  rgba(0,0,0,0.1) -1px 2px,
rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 1px -2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) -1px -2px,
rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px 1px,  rgba(0,0,0,0.1) -2px 1px,
rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px -1px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) -2px -1px;
}
#olHeader .ol-hamburger__menu-icon-inner:before{
	border: 1px solid #000000;
	border-radius: 5px;
	content: "";
	display: block;
	height: 150%;
	pointer-events: none;
	position: absolute;
	top: 40%;
	left: 52%;
  -ms-transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  -webkit-transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
	width: 150%;
}
#olFirstview .ol-firstview__inner{
	max-width: clamp(50em, 27rem + 28vw, 56em);
}
#olFirstview .ol-firstview__title{
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
  display: inline-block;
  color: #4D4D4D;
	margin-bottom: clamp(48px, 1.90909rem + 1.70455vw, 60px);
	padding: clamp(24px, 0.954545rem + 0.852275vw, 30px);
	width: auto;
}
#olFirstview .ol-firstview__title-subcopy{
  display: inline-block;
	width: auto;
}
#olFirstview .ol-firstview__title-maincopy{
  display: inline-block;
	margin-bottom: 0;
	width: auto;
}
#olFirstview .ol-firstview__title-maincopy span:not(.ol-firstview__title-text){
  display: inline;
}
#olAccess .ol-access__map{
}
#olAccess .ol-access__map iframe{
  display: block;
	height: 50vh !important;
	height: 50dvh !important;
	width: 100%;
}
#olAccess .ol-access__map picture{
	display: block;
}
#olAccess .ol-access__map picture img{
	width: 100%;
}
.jet-form-builder button[type="button"],
.jet-form-builder button[type="submit"]{
	background-color: #f53f99;
	border-radius: 5px;
  color: #ffffff;
	font-size: 16px;
	padding: 0.125em 1em;
}
#eyecatch{
	overflow: hidden;
}
#eyecatch img{
  width: 100%;
}
.wp-block-table table{
}
.wp-block-table table th{
	background-color: #F9E1EB;
	border: none;
	padding: 0.25em 1em;
  vertical-align: top;
	width: 10em;
}
.wp-block-table table td:first-child{
	background-color: #F9E1EB;
	border: none;
	padding: 0.25em 1em;
	border-spacing: 0.5em;
  vertical-align: top;
	width: 10em;
}
.wp-block-table table td:not(:first-child){
	border-color: #f53f99;
	border-style: solid;
	border-width:  0 1px 1px 0;
	padding: 0.25em 1em;
  vertical-align: top;
}
#olService{
	counter-reset: service 0;
}
#olService .ol-list-title{
	color: #f53f99;
	padding-left: 3em;
	position: relative;
}
#olService .ol-list-title:before{
	background-color: #f53f99;
	color: #fff;
	counter-increment: service 1;
	content: counter(service,decimal-leading-zero);
	display: inline-block;
	padding: 0 0.25em 0 0.375em;
	position: absolute;
	top: 0;
	left: 0;
	pointer-events:none;
}
#olService .service_contents{
	font-size: 80%;
	line-height: 2;
	margin: 0;
	padding: 0;
}
#olService .service_contents ul{
}
#olService .service_contents ul li{
	background-color: #f53f99;
	border-radius: 5px;
	color: #fff;
	display: inline-block;
	font-size: 80%;
	margin : 5px 1em 0 0;
	padding: 0 1em;
}
@media screen and (max-width:767px){
	.sp_hide{
		display: none !important;
	}
	#eyecatch{
		margin-bottom: -90px;
		position: relative;
	}
	#eyecatch:before{
		content: "";
		display: block;
		pointer-events: none;
		padding-top: 56.25%;
	}
	#eyecatch img{
		height: 100%;
		object-fit: cover;
		object-position: center;
		position: absolute;
		top: 0;
		left: 0;
	}
  .wp-block-table table,
  .wp-block-table table tbody,
  .wp-block-table table tr,
  .wp-block-table table th,
  .wp-block-table table td{
		display: block;
		width: 100% !important;
	}
	.wp-block-table table tr{
		margin-top: 1em;
